workflow.name: SDLC Review Reject Twice
workflow.goal: Add support for named greetings and uppercase output while preserving the default greeting, reject unsupported flags with a usage error, and update docs plus regression tests including invalid-option coverage. For this profile, invalid-option coverage means at least two distinct unsupported long-option cases, each proving the exact usage message on stderr, a non-zero exit, and no stdout output.

memory.review_cycle_goal: This scenario must exercise two reviewer request-changes cycles before final approval.
